summary: Hand-built HTML-scrape data layer: roadside domain package (attrlist/detail parser, superlative classifier, keyless OSM geocoder) plus near/state/show/search/sql commands and the SQLite cache integration.
reason: The generator does not emit sql/search/sync or structured commands for a response_format: html spec (no syncable JSON resource), so the entire scrape + query layer is hand-authored.
